title: Libellus post saeculum quam Ioannes Bolyai de Bolya anno MDCCCII A.D. XVIII kalendas ianuarias Claudiopoli natus est ad celebrandam memoriam eius immortalem.
content:
# Libellus post saeculum quam Ioannes Bolyai de Bolya anno MDCCCII A.D. XVIII kalendas ianuarias Claudiopoli natus est ad celebrandam memoriam eius immortalem.

Contributors: schlesinger, ludwig, magyar királyi ferenc józsef tudományegyetem
Date: 1902
Subjects: bólyai, jános, geometry, hyperbolic

Title in red and black. Preface signed: Ludovicus Schlesinger, huius libri redactor. Iulius Farkas, h.t. decanus. Half-title: Regia litt. universitas hung. claudiopolitana. Ioannis Bolyai in memoriam. A digital reproduction made from a copy held by Cornel University is available from the Cornell University Library's Historical Mathematics Monographs Web site.
